rationale: Review 1's only finding is a real, grounded placement issue (the public antipode_convMul_id lemma in TauCeti.HopfAlgebra namespace inside FunctorOfPoints.lean, used once internally at the call to antipode_convMul_id) that a maintainer would want fixed by making private; acting on it yields a strictly cleaner PR. Review 2's file-split demand misreads the module docstring+roadmap framing that intentionally places this exact convolution/group code in AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean (no Spec yet is expected), while its antipodeAlgHom claim is not a placement issue; acting on it forces contested restructuring with no material gain.
